description_zh_Hant: 一名濕透深藍高馬尾、淺藍挑染與藍色漸層眼睛的女孩在夜晚頂樓泳池中握著金屬扶梯爬出水面。她穿著濕透高叉白色連身泳裝，泳裝貼合身體並形成駱駝趾細節；藍色泳池燈與遠方都市燈光框住冷色夜景。

en: A girl with wet dark blue hair, light blue inner hair, gradient blue eyes, and makeup climbs from a rooftop pool at night. She grips the metal ladder with both hands while a wet high-cut white one-piece swimsuit clings to her body and creates a cameltoe detail.
